name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
   \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
   \/ /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
   \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = forks

(* Invariant: No two philosophers eat simultaneously if they share a fork *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
      /\ head' = head
         /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
         /\ count' = count + 1
         /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
      /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
         /\ tail' = tail
         /\ count' = count - 1
         /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, channel, marker, snapshot, finished
ProcessSet == {1, 2, ..., N}

\* Define the set of channels
ChannelSet == {p, q \in ProcessSet : p # q}

\* TypeOK ensures all variables have the correct type
TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in [ProcessSet -> State]
  /\ channel \in [ChannelSet -> Seq(Message)]
  /\ marker \in [ChannelSet -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ snapshot \in [ProcessSet -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ finished \in [ProcessSet -> BOOLEAN]

\* Initial state: all processes have not recorded state, all channels are empty
Init == 
  /\ state = [p \in ProcessSet |-> InitState(p)]
  /\ channel = [p, q \in ProcessSet : p # q |-> <<>>]
  /\ marker = [p, q \in ProcessSet : p # q |-> FALSE]
  /\ snapshot = [p \in ProcessSet |-> FALSE]
  /\ finished = [p \in ProcessSet |-> FALSE]

\* Next action: either a process records its state or sends/receives a marker
Next == 
  \E p \in ProcessSet :
    /\ snapshot[p] = FALSE
    /\ state[p] = NewState(p)
       /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
       /\ \E q \in ProcessSet : q # p
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !p..q = Append(channelp..q, Marker)]
          /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT !p..q = TRUE]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, marker, finished>>
    \/ /\ snapshot[p] = TRUE
       /\ \E q \in ProcessSet : q # p
          /\ markerp..q = FALSE
          /\ channelp..q = <<>>
             /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT !p..q = TRUE]
          \/ /\ channelp..q = <<msg, rest>>
             /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !p..q = rest]
             /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, marker, snapshot>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker, snapshot, finished>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE
VARIABLES chunk, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = FILE
    /\ chunk = 1
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = <<>>


Next ==
    /\ chunk <= Len(file)
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ chunk' = chunk + 1
    /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
    \/ /\ chunk <= Len(file)
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ chunk' = chunk
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
    \/ /\ chunk > Len(file)
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
    /\ chunk' = chunk
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunk, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunk \in Nat
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ receivedChunks \in Seq

====
